name: Cash - Operating Checking
description: Primary operating checking account. All Stripe settlements, contractor payments, and vendor charges flow through this account.

name: Cash - Tax Reserve
description: Separate account holding ~25% of net revenue for estimated quarterly taxes.

name: Stripe Settlements Receivable
description: Net of card and ACH payments settled by Stripe but not yet deposited. Cleared on each Stripe deposit transaction.

name: Accounts Receivable
description: Invoiced amounts billed to clients outside Stripe (typically ACH or check) awaiting collection.

name: Prepaid Software
description: Annual software subscriptions paid up-front, amortized monthly. Used for tools with material annual savings vs. monthly billing.

name: Equipment - Computers
description: Capitalized computer and display equipment over the de minimis threshold.

name: Accounts Payable
description: Vendor invoices received but not yet paid.

name: Credit Card Payable
description: Outstanding balance on the business credit card, paid monthly.

name: Sales Tax Payable
description: Sales tax collected on tangible goods (rare) owed to the state.

name: Owner's Contributed Capital
description: Cash and equipment contributed by the owner at formation.

name: Retained Earnings
description: Accumulated profits not yet drawn. Closed at year-end.

name: Owner Draws
description: Cash withdrawals by the owner from a single-member LLC. Not deductible; reduces equity.

name: Sales - Web Design
description: Website design and build projects. Recognized on milestone billing or completion.

name: Sales - Brand Identity
description: Logo, brand-system, and guidelines work. Fixed-price project revenue.

name: Sales - Retainer
description: Monthly retainer agreements for ongoing design work. Recognized in the month earned.

name: Sales - Print Design
description: Brochures, packaging, and other print-deliverable work.

name: Coworking & Office Rent
description: Monthly coworking-space membership. Includes desk, mailing address, and meeting-room credits.

name: Owner Salary - N/A
description: Placeholder; LLC owner takes draws, not salary. Retained for chart consistency; not used.

name: Self-Employment Tax Set-Aside
description: Memo account; not a real expense. Tax reserve transfers booked through this account.

name: Contract Labor
description: Payments to freelance subcontractors: copywriters, illustrators, web developers, motion designers.

name: Professional Liability Insurance
description: Annual E&O / professional liability policy.

name: Health Insurance
description: Monthly self-employed health-insurance premium.

name: Merchant Processing Fees
description: Stripe card and ACH fees.

name: Bank Service Charges
description: Monthly bank account and wire fees.

name: Software - Design Tools
description: Adobe Creative Cloud, Figma, Sketch, Procreate, Affinity, plug-ins. Core production tools.

name: Software - Hosting & Domains
description: Web hosting, domain registration, DNS, CDN, SSL services. Includes test sites for client projects.

name: Software - Project Management
description: Notion, Linear, Asana, Trello, Harvest. Project tracking and time tracking.

name: Software - Communication
description: Slack, Loom, Zoom, Calendly, email-hosting fees.

name: Software - Other & AI Tools
description: Catch-all for smaller-spend software not fitting other software categories. Includes AI-assistant subscriptions, font-licensing services, stock-asset libraries.

name: Office Supplies
description: Consumable office items: paper, pens, printer ink. Minimal volume given remote work.

name: Computer Hardware - Expensed
description: Computer accessories and peripherals under the capitalization threshold: keyboards, mice, drawing tablets, external drives, cables.

name: Marketing & Advertising
description: Portfolio platform fees (Dribbble, Behance Pro), LinkedIn ads, sponsored newsletter slots.

name: Professional Services - Accounting
description: Bookkeeper monthly fee, annual tax preparation, business-banking advisor consultations.

name: Professional Services - Legal
description: Contract review, IP filings, business-structure consultations.

name: Professional Development
description: Online courses, design conferences, book purchases for reference.

name: Conferences & Travel
description: Travel, lodging, and meals tied to design conferences and client visits.

name: Meals & Entertainment
description: Client meals and industry meetups. 50% deductible per IRS rules.

name: Telephone & Internet
description: Business phone line and home-office internet portion.

name: Reference Materials
description: Books, magazines, design annuals, font licenses purchased outright.

name: Interest Income
description: Interest earned on tax-reserve account.
